subtitle_matches_a_pattern_only_if.en: Matches a pattern only if it's preceded by another pattern. The lookbehind itself is zero-width: it doesn't consume characters.
subtitle_matches_a_pattern_only_if.zh: 仅当目标模式前面存在另一个模式时，才会匹配该模式。后向断言本身宽度为零：它不占用任何字符。

subtitle_matches_only_if_not_prece.en: Matches only if NOT preceded by the given pattern.
subtitle_matches_only_if_not_prece.zh: 仅当前面没有给定模式时才匹配。

subtitle_automated_tests_for_regex.en: Automated tests for regex edge cases. Tests run in your browser to verify actual engine behavior.
subtitle_automated_tests_for_regex.zh: 针对正则表达式极端情况的自动化测试。测试在浏览器中运行，以验证引擎的实际行为。

label_string_literals_in_classe.zh: 类中的字符串字面量（多码点）

metadesc_quick_reference_for_regul.zh: 正则表达式语法快速参考。内容涵盖锚点、字符类、量词、分组、前瞻/后瞻以及常用模式。

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Reporting API - ReportingObserver, report types, Report-To header builder, NEL overview, and real-time report viewer.
metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: Reporting API 的交互式演示平台 - ReportingObserver、报表类型、报表目标标题生成器、NEL 概览和实时报表查看器。

subtitle_create_a_reportingobserve.en: Create a ReportingObserver to capture deprecation and intervention reports generated by the browser.
subtitle_create_a_reportingobserve.zh: 创建一个 ReportingObserver 来捕获浏览器生成的弃用和干预报告。

subtitle_these_actions_may_trigger.en: These actions may trigger deprecation or intervention reports in supporting browsers.
subtitle_these_actions_may_trigger.zh: 这些操作可能会在支持的浏览器中触发弃用或干预报告。

subtitle_overview_of_all_report_ty.en: Overview of all report types supported by the Reporting API ecosystem.
subtitle_overview_of_all_report_ty.zh: 报告 API 生态系统支持的所有报告类型概述。

subtitle_build_the_report_to_and_r.en: Build the Report-To and Reporting-Endpoints HTTP response headers for server-side report collection.
subtitle_build_the_report_to_and_r.zh: 为服务器端报表收集构建 Report-To 和 Reporting-Endpoints HTTP 响应标头。

subtitle_view_captured_reports_wit.en: View captured reports with filtering. Reports from the ReportingObserver appear here in real-time.
subtitle_view_captured_reports_wit.zh: 查看已捕获的报告并进行筛选。来自 ReportingObserver 的报告会在此处实时显示。

subtitle_nel_uses_the_reporting_ap.en: NEL uses the Reporting API infrastructure to report network-level errors. Configured via HTTP headers.
subtitle_nel_uses_the_reporting_ap.zh: NEL 使用报告 API 基础架构来报告网络级错误。通过 HTTP 标头进行配置。

label_buffered_include_reports.en: Buffered (include reports generated before observer was created)
label_buffered_include_reports.zh: 已缓冲（包括观察者创建之前生成的报告）

jtc_you_can_capture_deprecati.en: You can capture deprecation and intervention reports.
jtc_you_can_capture_deprecati.zh: 您可以获取弃用和干预报告。

jtc_requires_chrome_edge_69_r.en: Requires Chrome/Edge 69+. Report-To headers work server-side in all browsers.
jtc_requires_chrome_edge_69_r.zh: 需要 Chrome/Edge 69+ 版本。Report-To 标头在所有浏览器中均可在服务器端正常工作。
